creator: freebsd@m.jl.ly
text:
When built with php81, the port does not install the file Names.php which makes most queries fail. When I copy it by hand from the build directory to /usr/local/share/pear/Net/DNS2, things work fine. There may be other files it should install, I haven't exercised it hard enough to tell.

It's not in the psckage.xml file and the build process complains about bad md5sums which suggests the package file is out of date.
